response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified song title 'Quiet Night C.E.73' from on-screen text.
2. Searched '"Quiet Night C.E.73" Japanese and English lyrics' to confirm original artist is Gundam SEED Destiny (Meer Campbell).
3. Confirmed Shubo Patra as the performer in the video.
4. Mapped scenes based on the end of the song performance at 01:28 and subsequent dialogue segments.
5. Formatted lyrics and metadata into the required JSON structure.
response.global_summary: The video features a performance of 'Quiet Night C.E.73' by Shubo Patra on a concert stage, followed by spoken segments featuring multiple characters (Karen, Iida Pochi, and Shubo Patra).

scenes.description: Shubo Patra performs 'Quiet Night C.E.73' on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
静かなこの夜に貴方を待ってるの
あのとき忘れた微笑みを取りに来て
あれから少しだけ時間が過ぎて
想い出が優しくなったね

星の降る場所で
貴方が笑っていることを
いつも願ってた

今遠くても
また会えるよね
いつから微笑みはこんなに儚くて
一つの間違いで壊れてしまうから
大切なもの

いつも願ってた
貴方が笑っていることを
静かなこの夜に

We are in the quiet night
Dreaming in the night

scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
On this quiet night, I'm waiting for you
Come and retrieve the smile you forgot back then
Only a little time has passed since then
The memories have become gentle, haven't they?

In the place where stars fall
I was always hoping
That you were smiling

Even if you're far away now
We'll be able to meet again, right?
Since when did smiles become so fleeting?
Because they break with a single mistake
Precious things

I'm always wishing
That you are happy
On this quiet night

We are in the quiet night
Dreaming in the night

I'm waiting for you on this quiet night
Come take back the smile you forgot back then
Only a little time has passed since then
The memories have become gentle

In the place where stars fall
I was always hoping
That you were smiling

I'm always wishing
That you are happy
On this quiet night

We are in the quiet night
Dreaming in the night
